title: Small Business Artificial Intelligence Advancement Act
action: Received in the Senate and Read twice and referred to the Committee on Commerce, Science, and Transportation.
summary: The Small Business Artificial Intelligence Advancement Act aims to promote and support the development of artificial intelligence in small businesses. Its exact details and goals are unclear due to the lack of a description.

title: To require artificial intelligence chatbot providers to provide data privacy and security, and for other purposes.
action: Referred to the House Committee on Energy and Commerce.
summary: This policy aims to ensure that artificial intelligence chatbot providers offer and prioritize their users' data privacy and security. It also covers other purposes related to regulating AI chatbots.

title: To establish a pilot program for use by U.S. Customs and Border Protection at land ports of entry along the Arizona border to assess the use of artificial intelligence through an anomaly detection algorithm, and for other purposes.
action: Referred to the House Committee on Homeland Security.
summary: This policy aims to create a test program at Arizona land borders using AI to identify unusual patterns through anomaly detection. The goal is to gather information on the feasibility and effectiveness of using AI for US Customs and Border Protection.

title: Artificial Intelligence Environmental Impacts Act of 2026
action: Referred to the Committee on Science, Space, and Technology, and in addition to the Committee on Energy and Commerce, for a period to be subsequently determined by the Speaker, in each case for consideration of such provisions as fall within the jurisdiction of the committee concerned.
summary: This policy aims to regulate and address the environmental impacts of artificial intelligence. The Artificial Intelligence Environmental Impacts Act of 2026 would likely establish guidelines and standards for AI technology to minimize its negative effects on the environment.

title: Protecting Families from AI Data Center Energy Costs Act
action: Forwarded by Subcommittee to Full Committee (Amended) by Voice Vote.
summary: This policy aims to protect families from the costs associated with energy usage in AI data centers. It likely seeks to make these costs more manageable or pass them along in a way that benefits family budgets.

title: Aging with Artificial Intelligence Act of 2026
action: Read twice and referred to the Committee on Health, Education, Labor, and Pensions.
summary: The Aging with Artificial Intelligence Act of 2026 aims to address the needs of seniors in the rapidly changing world of artificial intelligence. The exact details and provisions of the Act are unknown due to the lack of description.

title: Unleashing AI Innovation in Financial Services Act
action: Read twice and referred to the Committee on Banking, Housing, and Urban Affairs.
summary: The Unleashing AI Innovation in Financial Services Act aims to create an environment that fosters the development and adoption of artificial intelligence in the financial services industry. This policy likely aims to make regulations supportive of AI innovation while ensuring regulatory compliance and consumer protection.

title: Unleashing AI Innovation in Financial Services Act
action: Placed on the Union Calendar, Calendar No. 619.
summary: This document aims to encourage and facilitate the development and use of artificial intelligence within the financial services industry.

title: Protecting Consumers from Deceptive AI Act
action: Ordered to be Reported in the Nature of a Substitute (Amended) by the Yeas and Nays: 35 - 0.
summary: The Protecting Consumers from Deceptive AI Act aims to prevent and penalize the use of artificial intelligence for misleading or deceiving consumers. This law likely regulates AI-powered advertising, chatbots, and other technologies to ensure honesty and transparency in interactions with the public.

title: Generative AI Terrorism Risk Assessment Act
action: Received in the Senate and Read twice and referred to the Committee on Homeland Security and Governmental Affairs.
summary: This policy aims to assess and mitigate the risks associated with terrorist activities using generative artificial intelligence. It likely focuses on identifying and preventing potential threats from AI-generated content that could be used for malicious purposes.

title: To amend the National Artificial Intelligence Initiative Act of 2020 to require the Director of the Office of Science and Technology Policy to establish a prize competition program relating to artificial intelligence, and for other purposes.
action: Referred to the House Committee on Science, Space, and Technology.
summary: This policy document aims to amend the National Artificial Intelligence Initiative Act of 2020 to establish a prize competition program for artificial intelligence. The program is intended to promote innovation and achievement in AI.

title: Federal Artificial Intelligence Risk Management Act of 2026
action: Referred to the House Committee on Science, Space, and Technology.
summary: The Federal Artificial Intelligence Risk Management Act of 2026 is a policy document aimed at managing and mitigating the risks associated with artificial intelligence. It likely outlines guidelines and regulations to ensure the safe development and deployment of AI in the federal government and private sectors.

title: Generative AI Terrorism Risk Assessment Act
action: Read twice and referred to the Committee on Homeland Security and Governmental Affairs.
summary: The Generative AI Terrorism Risk Assessment Act is a policy aimed at assessing potential risks associated with generative AI technologies. The goal of this act is likely to identify and mitigate potential security threats posed by AI-generated content.

title: NSF AI Education Act of 2025

summary: The NSF AI Education Act of 2025 is a policy aimed at providing education and support for Artificial Intelligence. This act is overseen by the National Science Foundation, and it appears to focus on AI-related education initiatives.

title: Workforce for AI Trust Act

title: CREATE AI Act of 2025

summary: The CREATE AI Act of 2025 is a policy aimed at regulating and developing artificial intelligence. Details of the act are not provided, but it likely addresses issues relevant to AI, including its creation and usage.

title: Artificial Intelligence Data Center Moratorium Act
action: Referred to the Committee on Energy and Commerce, and in addition to the Committee on Foreign Affairs, for a period to be subsequently determined by the Speaker, in each case for consideration of such provisions as fall within the jurisdiction of the committee concerned.
summary: The Artificial Intelligence Data Center Moratorium Act aims to establish a temporary halt on new artificial intelligence data center construction. The policy likely seeks to address concerns about energy consumption, environmental impact, or other issues related to the growth of AI data centers.

title: Artificial Intelligence Data Center Moratorium Act
action: Read twice and referred to the Committee on Commerce, Science, and Transportation.
summary: The Artificial Intelligence Data Center Moratorium Act is a law that puts a temporary stop on the construction of new artificial intelligence data centers. The purpose of this act is likely to address potential environmental and social concerns related to the rapid growth of AI infrastructure.

title: Voluntary Consumer AI Disclosure Pilot Act
action: Referred to the House Committee on Science, Space, and Technology.
summary: The Voluntary Consumer AI Disclosure Pilot Act aims to make consumers more aware of artificial intelligence use in products and services. This is done by introducing a voluntary disclosure pilot that would allow companies to provide transparency about AI use in their products.

summary: The SBA Artificial Intelligence Utilization Act of 2026 is a policy that aims to regulate and promote the use of artificial intelligence within the Small Business Administration. The exact details of the policy are not available, as there is no provided description.

title: Heat Emergency Assessment and Tracking using AI Act
action: Referred to the House Committee on Energy and Commerce.
summary: The Heat Emergency Assessment and Tracking using AI Act is a policy aimed at utilizing artificial intelligence to assess and track heat emergencies. The goal of this policy is to utilize AI technology for data analysis and warning systems to mitigate the effects of heat emergencies.

title: Small AI Innovators Empowerment Act
action: Referred to the House Committee on Science, Space, and Technology.
summary: The Small AI Innovators Empowerment Act aims to support and empower smaller or emerging artificial intelligence innovators. The specifics of the policy are unclear without further information as no description is provided.

title: Fraudulent Artificial Intelligence Regulations (FAIR) Elections Act of 2026
action: Read twice and referred to the Committee on Rules and Administration.
summary: The Fraudulent Artificial Intelligence Regulations (FAIR) Elections Act of 2026 is a law aimed at preventing the misuse of AI in elections for fraudulent purposes. This act likely regulates the use of artificial intelligence to protect the integrity of the electoral process.

title: Department of Advanced Technology and Artificial Intelligence Act
action: Referred to the House Committee on Oversight and Government Reform.
summary: This law appears to be about setting policies and regulations for the development and use of advanced technology and artificial intelligence within the Department of Advanced Technology, focusing on guidelines and oversight.

title: American Leadership in AI Act
action: Referred to the Committee on Science, Space, and Technology, and in addition to the Committees on Energy and Commerce, Agriculture, Oversight and Government Reform, Education and Workforce, the Judiciary, and Ways and Means, for a period to be subsequently determined by the Speaker, in each case for consideration of such provisions as fall within the jurisdiction of the committee concerned.
summary: The American Leadership in AI Act aims to establish guidelines and regulations for the development and use of artificial intelligence technology in the United States. The policy appears to focus on advancing AI while ensuring safety, security, and accountability.
